ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties by the team */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "bowl_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of bowl appearances */,
  "bowl_wins" INTEGER /* Number of bowl wins */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* Team's Facebook handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "turf_type" TEXT /* Type of turf used in the stadium */,
  "year_stadium_opened" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "luxury_boxes" INTEGER /* Number of luxury boxes in the stadium */,
  "club_seats" INTEGER /* Number of club seats in the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's official website */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Information about parking facilities */,
  "public_transport" TEXT /* Information about public transport options */,
  "concession_details" TEXT /* Details about food and beverage concessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stadiums" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium associated with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team whose game the tickets are for */,
  "upper_deck_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of upper deck tickets sold */,
  "end_zone_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of end zone tickets sold */,
  "mezzanine_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of mezzanine tickets sold */,
  "sideline_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of sideline tickets sold */,
  "club_seat_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of club seat tickets sold */,
  "luxury_box_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of luxury box tickets sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the ticket sale */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from the ticket sale */,
  "average_ticket_price" TEXT /* Average price of tickets sold */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_caps" (
  "salary_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary cap record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the salary cap record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Specific season for the salary cap */,
  "total_salary_cap" INTEGER /* Total salary cap for the season */,
  "current_salary_spent" INTEGER /* Amount of salary already spent */,
  "lost_salary_cap_this_season" INTEGER /* Amount of salary cap lost this season */,
  "lost_salary_cap_next_season" INTEGER /* Projected amount of salary cap lost next season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_caps_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_stats" (
  "playoff_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff stat record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the playoff stats */,
  "season" TEXT /* Specific season for the playoff stats */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances in the season */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Total playoff wins in the season */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Total playoff losses in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the performance record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Specific season for the performance data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in that year */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in that year */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties in that year */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team made the playoffs */,
  "bowl_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team made a bowl appearance */,
  "bowl_win" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won a bowl game */,
  "conference_champion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won the conference */,
  "division_champion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
